## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential content marketing collaboration between promptfoo and fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/umB_fyy4jEVFkrTHNMCF6wDCvRzdPj3e?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel presented fwd.digital's AI-powered content creation service, showcasing its effectiveness for technical content and SEO growth](https://fathom.video/share/umB_fyy4jEVFkrTHNMCF6wDCvRzdPj3e?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Ian expressed interest in the service, particularly for strategy and keyword exploration](https://fathom.video/share/umB_fyy4jEVFkrTHNMCF6wDCvRzdPj3e?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Agreement reached on a 3-month trial at $6,000/month, with potential for 12-month commitment if successful](https://fathom.video/share/umB_fyy4jEVFkrTHNMCF6wDCvRzdPj3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1798.0)
  - [Kickoff scheduled for October 28th, pending final confirmation](https://fathom.video/share/umB_fyy4jEVFkrTHNMCF6wDCvRzdPj3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)

## Topics

### Company Backgrounds

  - [Ian Webster: Former Discord engineer, now founder of promptfoo (AI security tool)](https://fathom.video/share/umB_fyy4jEVFkrTHNMCF6wDCvRzdPj3e?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Marcel Santilli: Content marketing expert, founder of fwd.digital (AI-powered content service)](https://fathom.video/share/umB_fyy4jEVFkrTHNMCF6wDCvRzdPj3e?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

### fwd.digital's Content Creation Service

  - [Uses AI workflows with human oversight to generate high-quality, SEO-optimized content](https://fathom.video/share/umB_fyy4jEVFkrTHNMCF6wDCvRzdPj3e?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Customizable to client's voice, tone, and technical requirements](https://fathom.video/share/umB_fyy4jEVFkrTHNMCF6wDCvRzdPj3e?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Integrates various data sources (e.g., Google search, company docs, research papers)](https://fathom.video/share/umB_fyy4jEVFkrTHNMCF6wDCvRzdPj3e?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Includes strategy, execution, and ongoing optimization](https://fathom.video/share/umB_fyy4jEVFkrTHNMCF6wDCvRzdPj3e?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Pricing typically $9,000/month for 100,000 words, with flexibility for startups](https://fathom.video/share/umB_fyy4jEVFkrTHNMCF6wDCvRzdPj3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)

### Technical Content Challenges

  - [Ian's concern: AI security is a new, technical field with limited existing content](https://fathom.video/share/umB_fyy4jEVFkrTHNMCF6wDCvRzdPj3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Marcel's solution: Collaborate closely to identify unique sources and calibrate content quality](https://fathom.video/share/umB_fyy4jEVFkrTHNMCF6wDCvRzdPj3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
  - [Suggestion to start with lower volume, focus on depth and quality in initial weeks](https://fathom.video/share/umB_fyy4jEVFkrTHNMCF6wDCvRzdPj3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### SEO and Content Strategy

  - [Ian expressed need for keyword exploration and analysis](https://fathom.video/share/umB_fyy4jEVFkrTHNMCF6wDCvRzdPj3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [Marcel outlined rapid strategy development process (2 days) as part of kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/umB_fyy4jEVFkrTHNMCF6wDCvRzdPj3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [Emphasized importance of "planting seeds" and iterating based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/umB_fyy4jEVFkrTHNMCF6wDCvRzdPj3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)

## Next Steps
